Small Business Automation Software 2026 — Booking, WhatsApp Reminders & Customer Loyalty | MIRAC Technologies

  • ✓ Fixed-price contract
  • ✓ NDA signed on first call
  • ✓ Full IP transfer on delivery
  • ✓ 12-month support SLA
  • ✓ Senior engineers only
  • ✓ 0 missed deadlines in 24 months
We take on a limited number of projects per quarter.
3 spots available for Q3 2026.
Join 30+ companies across 8 countries who trust MIRAC with their critical systems
Home | Contact Us | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software

Local businesses such as hair salons, wellness clinics, gyms, and independent restaurants face constant challenges in managing daily operations while providing excellent customer service. Handling appointments over the phone, dealing with no-shows, and manually responding to customer inquiries on social media takes valuable time away from core business activities. MIRAC Technologies offers a comprehensive Small Business Automation Software designed specifically to streamline operations for local enterprises across the US, UK, Australia, and Canada. Our platform provides a seamless online booking system that integrates directly with your website and social media profiles, allowing customers to schedule appointments 24/7. To drastically reduce no-shows and improve customer engagement, the software features powerful WhatsApp automation. It automatically sends appointment confirmations, timely reminders, and post-visit follow-up messages. The system also includes robust payment integration to handle deposits or full payments securely at the time of booking. Furthermore, a built-in Customer Relationship Management (CRM) tool helps

businesses track customer preferences, purchase history, and run automated loyalty programs to encourage repeat visits. Starting at an affordable price point of $1,500, our solution empowers small business owners to modernize their operations, enhance the customer experience, and focus on growing their business rather than being bogged down by administrative tasks. How Much Are Phone Bookings Costing You?

Missed calls mean missed revenue...

WhatsApp Automation: What It Actually Does

Streamlining communication without lifting a finger...

Real Numbers: Before and After Automation

40 appointments/week × 20% no-show × $50 avg = $400/week = $20,000/year lost to no-shows.
